message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "SendMessageController" as SendMessageController
participant "SendMessageEngine" as SendMessageEngine
participant "SendMessageSender" as SendMessageSender
participant "Socket" as Socket
participant "ObjectOutputStream" as ObjectOutputStream

SendMessageController -> SendMessageEngine : sendMessage(message)
SendMessageEngine -> SendMessageSender : create(message, port)
SendMessageSender -> Socket : create(message.getInetAddress(), port)
SendMessageEngine -> SendMessageSender : sendMessage()
SendMessageSender -> ObjectOutputStream : create(socket.getOutputStream())
SendMessageSender -> ObjectOutputStream : writeObject(message.getSheetTalkMessage())
SendMessageSender -> ObjectOutputStream : flush()
SendMessageSender -> ObjectOutputStream : close()
SendMessageSender -> Socket : close()

@enduml
